programs.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol 11 Compilations
programs.desc: The adventures of Dr. Pol's team, dealing with patients of various species.From chihuahuas to chinchillas, from cows to alligators, from alpacas to camels - every animal will get help.

programs.title: The Hidden Kingdoms of China
programs.desc: The creators of the program invite you to an expedition through China, the most populous country in the world with towering mountains, plateaus, impenetrable jungle and vibrant bamboo forests.
